properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: It's a virtual world we live in Only Jesus Christ is real If it were possible the very elect would have been deceived There's a power that is moving Deceiving hearts with fear Hell is swiftly following death Spreading chaos everywhere The pit of hell has opened up all hell is on the earth the world is in such a hideous condition A way has been made for the devil's reincarnation Troubles on every side. How can we escape? And the hour is so late, what does it take?

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: A rapture (Don't you fear) It takes a rapture (These are the words that I hear) Your God has not given you more than you can bear Hold on (Though the whole world is united) Be strong (There's another world uniting) Trust and obey, There is no other way It takes a rapture

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Even the earth is groaning For the manifestations When sons and daughters of the living God identify themselves For her rivers are polluted her streams are all dry The land is filled with blood How much more can she take This is why the earth quakes for a rapture

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: A rapture (Don't you fear) It takes a rapture (Our God will take us from here) Our God has not given us more than we can bear Hold on (Though one group on earth is riding) Be strong (There's another group that's riding) Trust and obey, There is no other way It takes a rapture

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: /: And one by one (God is sealing his elected Bride) In this evil day (Who are a part of the first resurrection) Just a few more days to labour And we will be changed :/

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: A rapture (Don't you fear) It takes a rapture (These are the words that I hear) Our God has not given us more than we can bear Hold on (Though one group on earth is riding) Be strong (There's another group that's riding) Trust and obey There is no other way It takes a rapture Trust and obey There is no other way It takes a rapture
